description: Replace the content of a target text object or selection. Accepts either a text object variable (textreplace(target, source)) or a string literal (textreplace(target, "new text")) as the replacement source. When source is a variable, the source content animates to the target position while the target fades out. When source is a string, the old content fades out and the new string appears in place. Clicking the mutator icon opens the Explorer side panel with full AsciiMath editing, live preview, and symbol picker.
utility: Replace text content with another text object or a string literal

arguments.name: target
arguments.description: Text object or selection to be replaced (will fade out)

arguments.name: source
arguments.description: Replacement content — either a text object variable (write, print, label, select result) or a string literal in quotes

alternates.description: Copy source object content to target position, target fades out
Replace target content with a string literal
Replace with text object and position offset
Replace with string literal and position offset

Replace radius variable with actual value (equation of a circle lesson)
Replace variable in equation with numeric value
